items.title: Delta farmers in a quandary on kuruvai cultivation

items.title: Understanding khayal, a form of Hindustani classical music, and its secret masters
items.summary: Sumana Ramanan’s book The Secret Master profiles Arun Kashalkar’s Kkhayal journey, exploring classical music’s marginalizsed ecosystem. At a discussion with TM Krishna in Chennai, she spoke about the commodification and cultural shifts threatening Hindustani music, urging institutional support for gurus and more performance spaces

items.title: Water bells initiative forgotten by most government schools in Chennai
items.summary: The School Education Dept. introduced it last year to ensure that students remained hydrated. The initiative was not taken seriously; it was not implemented properly last year too, say teachers

items.title: Around 70% of overbridge work near Fort Railway Station completed, says Tiruchi Mayor
items.summary: According to the Mayor, once the railway portion of the overbridge is completed, the Corporation will finish the remaining approach works on either side, following which the bridge will be opened for public use

items.title: Pozhichalur Thangal gets new lease of life after EFI-led restoration
items.summary: NGO removes 11 tonnes of waste and desilts the twin ponds that suffered years of garbage dumping, sewage inflow, and neglect, raising storage capacity to over 8.6 crore litres. EFI founder Arun Krishnamurthy says restoration of the south pond began in September 2025, while work on the four-acre north pond was completed by March this year
